extraction_reasoning: No litigation summary table is provided in the supplied risk section, so no criminal, statutory/regulatory, or tax rows—whether Against or By—can be counted, and no quantified group litigation aggregate can be extracted. The contingent-liabilities table states a Total of ₹36.50 million as of December 31, 2020; this stated Total is used without re-summing and converts to ₹3.65 crore (₹36.50 million ÷ 10). The section provides revenue concentration percentages for public health agencies and for Maharashtra, Rajasthan and Karnataka, but not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer percentages for a full fiscal year, so those fields are not disclosed. The monetary source unit used in the contingent-liabilities table is ₹ million; no separate litigation-table unit is provided.
